summary: Ported a large block of Dolphin OS library code from the SMB decompilation, replacing substantial hand-written assembly for OSAlloc, OSAudioSystem, OSError, OSMemory, OSMutex, OSSync, __start, and __ppc_eabi_init with C or mixed C/inline-asm implementations. The PR also added and repaired Dolphin OS headers, stdarg/stdio support, build object lists, and generation tooling needed for these SDK-library sources. Evidence shows no review comments in this slice, so lessons are inferred from the diff and PR body rather than reviewer discussion.

key_files.role: C replacement for OSAlloc.s, including heap state, heap creation/destruction/checking, and forced string data for OSDumpHeap
C replacement for OSAudioSystem.s using DSP/audio hardware setup, cache flushing, and arena APIs
C implementation of OSReport, OSPanic, OSSetErrorHandler, error table, and mixed/nonmatching __OSUnhandledException handling
System call vector/init port with inline asm and NON_MATCHING fallback around vector copying/cache invalidation
Mutex implementation adjusted around OSThread/OSMutex structures, with remaining inline asm check helpers
Startup/runtime init port retaining asm entry points such as __start and __flush_cache
Kept __ctors symbol in assembly with comments documenting why it was not migrated cleanly to C
Major struct/prototype refresh for OSThread, thread queues, mutex queues, mutex links, states, flags, callbacks, and thread APIs
Public OSMutex declarations and struct layout tied to OSThread and OSMutexLink
Added OSError/OSErrorHandler types and OS_ERROR_* constants
Added MWERKS-compatible va_list/va_start/va_arg handling plus non-MWERKS builtin fallbacks
Added FILE-like struct placeholder and printf-family prototypes required by OSReport/OSPanic
Updated generation tooling to concatenate project headers and m2c macros inside pragma regions
Build list updated to use newly ported C objects instead of deleted assembly objects

what_changed: Deleted full assembly files for asm/dolphin/os/OSAlloc.s, asm/dolphin/os/OSAudioSystem.s, and asm/dolphin/os/OSSync.s, and removed the OSGetPhysicalMemSize body from OSMemory.s after adding C replacements.

Added src/dolphin/os/OSAlloc.c with heap globals HeapArray, NumHeaps, ArenaStart, ArenaEnd, __OSCurrHeap, allocation alignment/range macros, OSInitAlloc, OSCreateHeap, OSDestroyHeap, OSCheckHeap, and forced OSDumpHeap-related strings.
Added src/dolphin/os/OSAudioSystem.c with __OSInitAudioSystem and __OSStopAudioSystem replacing the prior low-level DSP/audio assembly file.
Added src/dolphin/os/OSError.c with OSReport, OSPanic, __OSErrorTable, OSSetErrorHandler, and mixed handling for __OSUnhandledException.
Kept special assembly/data support for OSError under NON_MATCHING control: asm/dolphin/os/OSError.s now retains data labels such as lbl_80401FF8/jtbl_804022D4 only when needed.
Added src/dolphin/os/OSSync.c with __OSSystemCallVector and __OSInitSystemCall, using inline asm for exact vector code and a NON_MATCHING C version for the system-call init path.
Updated src/dolphin/os/OSMutex.c and added src/dolphin/os/OSMutex.h while also refreshing the public include/dolphin/os/OSMutex.h.
Reworked include/dolphin/os/OSThread.h with explicit queue/link structs, thread fields with offsets, state/flag enums, and thread/mutex API prototypes.
Updated startup headers and source for __start and __ppc_eabi_init, including corrected void prototypes and runtime copy/BSS info structs.
Added stdarg.h and stdio.h support needed by the OS error/reporting code.
Updated gen.sh to feed include/ and src/ headers plus tools/m2c/m2c_macros.h into generated m2c context with pragma regions.
Updated obj_files.mk so the build consumes the new C sources.
smart_moves: Used SMB decomp as an explicit upstream source and checklist, limiting guesswork for SDK-library code that is shared across GameCube titles.
Converted large, stable OS SDK assembly blocks to C while preserving exact assembly only where the diff shows matching was still difficult or impossible.
Isolated unavoidable assembly behind NON_MATCHING or asm functions rather than blocking the whole library port on the hardest routines.
Documented the __ctors migration failure directly in asm/dolphin/os/init/__ppc_eabi_init.s, including references to CodeWarrior/NXP material and noting that #pragma section attempts did not work.
Preserved data/string layout details using techniques like .set lbl_80401FF8, report_messages - 0x5C and #pragma force_active for OSAlloc strings.
Added compiler/runtime headers such as stdarg.h and stdio.h instead of scattering ad-hoc prototypes through OS error code.
Moved struct knowledge into headers, especially OSThread/OSMutex layouts, so later Dolphin OS ports can share the same ABI assumptions.
decomp_lessons: Cross-game SDK ports are high leverage for Dolphin libraries, but they still require local adaptation of headers, object lists, labels, data placement, and remaining nonmatching routines.

For low-level runtime and exception code, a mixed strategy is practical: implement ordinary C helpers first, then keep exact inline asm or external asm for exception vectors, startup entry points, system-call vectors, and ctor table placement.
Matching OS library code often depends as much on data layout and string placement as on function control flow; preserving report string order and label offsets can be necessary.
When adding SDK structs, include offset comments and forward declarations to stabilize future matching work across thread/mutex code.
Tooling that generates m2c context should include both public include headers and local src headers, because decompiled library code may depend on either.
MWERKS-specific varargs behavior matters for OSReport/OSPanic-style functions; using a compiler-aware stdarg.h avoids brittle local hacks.
If a C conversion cannot express a special section or symbol such as __ctors, leaving a small documented assembly island is preferable to an unexplained nonmatch.
naming_conventions: Public Dolphin OS APIs retain SDK-style names with OS prefixes, e.g. OSInitAlloc, OSCreateHeap, OSDestroyHeap, OSCheckHeap, OSReport, OSPanic, OSSetErrorHandler, OSGetTick.
Internal Dolphin OS routines and globals use double-underscore prefixes, e.g. __OSInitAudioSystem, __OSStopAudioSystem, __OSUnhandledException, __OSErrorTable, __OSCurrHeap, __OSUnlockAllMutex.
Error constants were introduced as OS_ERROR_* macros, including OS_ERROR_SYSTEM_RESET, OS_ERROR_DSI, OS_ERROR_ALIGNMENT, OS_ERROR_PROGRAM, and OS_ERROR_MAX.
Headers use include guards following project path names such as DOLPHIN_OS_OSERROR_H, DOLPHIN_OS_OSMUTEX_H, DOLPHIN_OS_INIT___START_H, and DOLPHIN_OS_INIT___PPC_EABI_INIT_H.
Unknown struct fields are kept with offset-oriented placeholder names such as WORD_0x2D4, WORD_0x2D8, ARR_0x310, and comments like // at 0x2C8.
Local macros in OSAlloc mirror SDK assertion terminology from strings, e.g. InRange, OFFSET, ALIGNMENT, and MINOBJSIZE.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used NON_MATCHING guards for code paths that have a readable C version but still require exact assembly for matching, notably OSError __OSUnhandledException and OSSync __OSInitSystemCall.
Kept asm void functions for hard ABI/vector/startup routines such as __OSSystemCallVector, __OSInitSystemCall, __start, and __flush_cache.
Retained small assembly file support for __ctors because the author noted no discernible way to migrate it to C using #pragma section or placement in __start.c.
Used .set lbl_80401FF8, report_messages - 0x5C to preserve an expected data label relationship while moving most OSError logic to C.
Used #pragma push / #pragma force_active on / #pragma pop to keep OSAlloc dump strings emitted even if not referenced by compiled C.
Preserved hardware-address constants and vector placement in C/asm, e.g. OS_SYS_CALL_HANDLER at 0x80000C00, OS_HANDLER_SLOT_SIZE 0x100, audio/DSP region 0x81000000, and CC005000 audio registers.
Updated gen.sh to pipe collected headers and m2c macros through pragma regions, supporting more accurate m2c context generation for future matching.

review_feedback.note: The provided PR context reports zero issue comments, review comments, and reviews; no human review feedback is available in this slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that remove NON_MATCHING from __OSUnhandledException or __OSInitSystemCall.
Find PRs that further refine OSThread.h field names WORD_0x2D4, WORD_0x2D8, WORD_0x30C, and ARR_0x310.
Find follow-up work that moves or deletes src/dolphin/os/OSMutex.h versus include/dolphin/os/OSMutex.h duplication.
Find PRs referencing __ctors, #pragma section, or __ppc_eabi_init matching.
Find PRs that reuse the SMB decomp source for additional Dolphin SDK libraries.
